title: Kids Lunch Box - Fun Printed Design for Girls & Boys | Food-Grade Plastic | BPA-Free | Easy Clip Lid | Ideal for School, Home, Travel, Picnics, and Lunch on The Go (Transport)
features: DURABLE & SAFE FOOD-GRADE PLASTIC: Crafted from premium, BPA-free, food-grade plastic, this lunch box is designed for daily use, ensuring both safety and durability. Perfect for parents seeking a long-lasting and non-toxic option for their kids' meals.

FUN AND ATTRACTIVE PRINTED DESIGN FOR BOYS & GIRLS: Features vibrant and playful prints that appeal to both girls and boys, making lunchtime more exciting and enjoyable. The design is perfect for school, travel, and even picnics, giving children a fun accessory to carry their meals.

SECURE, EASY CLIP TOP LID FOR MESS-FREE MEALS: The lunch box comes with an easy-to-use clip top lid that locks securely into place. This ensures that the contents remain intact and spill-free, whether packed in a school bag or carried on a trip, making it a reliable option for parents and children alike.

COMPACT SIZE, SPACIOUS INTERIOR: Measuring 12x17x6 cm, the lunch box is perfectly sized to fit into any backpack or school bag while offering enough space to pack a hearty meal for kids. It's designed for easy carrying without taking up too much room in a bag.

HAND WASH FOR LONGEVITY: Easy to clean by hand with warm, soapy water, ensuring that the fun design and structure remain intact for longer use. Please note that it is not microwave or dishwasher safe, preserving the quality of the product.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE DESIGN: Despite its durable construction, this lunch box is lightweight, making it easy for kids to carry in their backpacks without adding extra weight. It's perfect for active children who need a hassle-free meal solution on the go.

ECO-FRIENDLY & REUSABLE: A great alternative to single-use plastic bags or containers, this reusable lunch box promotes sustainability by reducing waste. It's an eco-conscious choice for environmentally aware parents and kids.
description: Product Description Kids lunch box Bento box for kids Fun designs The lunch box features vibrant, playful designs with space dinosaurs and transport themes, making lunchtime an exciting adventure for kids! Easy clip lock lid The easy clip-top lid ensures secure closure, keeping lunch fresh and mess-free for hassle-free packing and unpacking. Compact size The compact size makes this lunch box easy to carry and fit in backpacks, perfect for school or on-the-go meals. Encourages healthy eating This lunch box encourages healthy eating by providing a fun way for kids to pack nutritious meals and snacks they’ll enjoy.
